calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Continued To Oct-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Oct-08-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. *** NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. *** JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Guadalupe Gamino (415-706-2090) for Plaintiff/ opposing party James Jones.
Ray Yetka (415-357-0600) for Defendant/Moving party DEBRA DOLCH.

Hearing is held. The parties inform the court they have stipulated to sustain the demurrer with leave to amend until Jan. 22, 2019. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DEBRA DOLCH's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend until January 22, 2019 upon the stipulation of counsel. Defendant to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Joinder Of Defendant Scott Hendler In The Demurrer To The Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Guadalupe Gamino (415-706-2090) for Plaintiff/ opposing party James Jones.
Ray Yetka (415-357-0600) for Defendant/Moving party DEBRA DOLCH.

Hearing is held. The parties inform the court they have stipulated to sustain the demurrer with leave to amend until Jan. 22, 2019. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SCOTT HENDLER's JOINDER In The Demurrer To The Second Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend until January 22, 2019 upon the stipulation of counselS PRESENT IN OPEN COURT. pREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH crc 3.1312(B). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
